description_of_loss: On 01/08/2025, construction work being performed by Horizon Landscaping Services at 330 Madison Avenue, 12th Floor, New York, NY 10017 caused damage to our insured's adjacent property at 1100 N. Meridian Street, Oklahoma City, OK 73107. The damage resulted from failure to secure construction debris during the construction process. Our insured, Maria L. Vasquez, reported cracking in foundation walls and ceilings beginning shortly after construction commenced.
